name: autowiki
description: Turn documents into a validated, cross-referenced knowledge base. Ingests markdown, PDFs, code, CSVs, logs. Checks claims against sources.

interface.shortDescription: Build validated knowledge bases from any document
interface.longDescription: AutoWiki ingests documents (PDFs, code, CSVs, logs, markdown), extracts claims, validates them against their sources, and builds a searchable, cross-referenced knowledge base. Claims get confidence scores. Contradictions get flagged instead of buried.
defaultPrompt: ingest this PDF into my wiki
what does my knowledge base know about semiconductor revenue
validate the claims in my wiki
